title: The Cat on the Cloud
paragraphs: High up in the sky, there was an especially large white cloud, and on it lived an orange cat named Marmalade.
Marmalade's job was to walk back and forth on the cloud, fluffing it up with his paws so that people below would see the most beautiful clouds in the sky.
One evening, Marmalade drifted over a small city. He looked down and saw a little boy leaning on a windowsill, gazing up at the sky with a lonely expression.
The boy's name was Hikaru. He had just moved to a new city and hadn't made any friends yet.
Marmalade pushed the cloud a little lower and drew a smiley face on it with his paw. When Hikaru saw the cloud turn into a smiley face, he couldn't help but smile too.
From that day on, Marmalade would float to Hikaru's window every evening, shaping the clouds into different things — a fish, a star, a butterfly.
Hikaru started drawing these cloud shapes and sharing them at school. His classmates thought they were wonderful, and soon everyone was looking at the sky together.
Just like that, Hikaru made many new friends. Every day after school, they would sit on the grass and watch the ever-changing clouds.
Up on his cloud, Marmalade watched Hikaru laughing with his friends and felt warm inside. He stretched, yawned, and curled up on the fluffy cloud.
The sun slowly set, painting the sky a warm orange — just like Marmalade's fur. Everything became peaceful and lovely. Goodnight, sweet dreams.
